11111.content:
Tsunade was fed up with this.

She knew that a festival was being planned in Konoha, but it bothered her that most of her subordinates were off preparing for it instead of doing their jobs. So, for today at least, if she wanted something done she'd have to do it herself.

The busty blonde Hokage made her way through the forest around the village until she found the small cave entrance, seemingly carved in the ground.

A trader sent from Gaara stumbled across this odd cave. Neither he nor Tsunade were familiar with it, so Tsunade decided to investigate.

She made her was down in through the entryway, a torch in hand.

She looked down at her feet, feeling something there.

She kicked, sending a few spiders cascading off of her.

"Gross..." She snarled as she kept going.

After a time, the cave turned from dirt to stone, and opened up to a large room.

The room was, for the most part, empty. With one exception.

In the back of the room stood some sort of altar. On it, a statue. Or rather, three statues.

The statue in the middle was a man standing, arms crossed, a smile on his face. To his left and right, though, were two naked women, bowing down to him.

Tsunade looked it over and sneered.

"Disgusting"

She looked down. At the base of the statue was a sort of tray, and on it, an ancient looking necklace. A golden choker.

Tsunade bent down and picked it up, looking it over.

"Decent taste in jewelry though." She shrugged. She looked down again, seeing text carved into the tray. But it was in an ancient language. One Tsunade certainly couldn't read.

"I'll send someone to read this later" she said to herself, still looking at the necklace.

"Hm... May as well. I deserve a reward for all this" she smiled.

As she entered her bedroom that night after her shower, dressed in only a nightgown, she saw the necklace, which she had placed on her bedside table.

Once again, she looked it over. Running her fingers up and down it.

"Well... Now that I have a mirror..." She pondered, putting the necklace on.

Once it latched, she had only a few seconds to appreciate it...

Her eyes rolled back in her head and she collapsed sideways onto her bed. Her body began to shake, making her giant tits and ample ass wobble.

"I must obey"

"My purpose is to serve"

"I will do as I am told"

She chanted these words over and over. For minutes.

Eventually her body settled, and her chanting stopped. Tsunade lay there, asleep, until morning.

Tsunade stepped out of her home the next day. She was going into work, but only briefly. The festival began in a few short hours. And so she made her way to her office. But little did she know what today had in store for her...

Unfortunately for Tsunade, she could not read that ancient text carved in the basin where she got the necklace. If she had, she never would have put it on. As the text read;

"Be wary, traveler. The dark magic cast on this golden accessory is highly dangerous. The weather will be unable to remove it of their own will, and from the moment they wear it, they will be unable to refuse any request or demand. If you see this, please turn back and never return."

Poor Tsunade had no idea... And her new life of servitude was just about to begin...

But what happens?

111111.content:
Tsunade made her way into her office and took a seat at her desk, sighing deeply as she relaxed back. This last stretch of festival prep was going to be stressful. But it would be worth it once the festivities had begun.

As Tsunade sat there in a brief moment of peace, the door to her office opened and Shizune came in, papers in hand.

"Lady Tsunade" she said, bowing.

"Good morning, Shizune." she sighed "What do we need to do today?"

"Well, I have to get the entertainers organized. Get some of the patrols set up. Deal with the dignitaries from other villages who are coming to join in, and gather costumes for the show." she said

"Costumes?" Tsunade inquired

"Yeah. A local tailor was in charge of making them. Everyone has been fitted for them, and the man has been paid. The only people who haven't been fitted are..." she began, flipping through her papers "Naruto Uzumaki, Kiba Inzuka, and... well... you."

"I really have to dress in a costume?" Tsunade grumbled

"You get to pick out the design. I'd get going now if you want it to be done in time!" she said.

"Get going now" a voice rang in Tsunade's head. She stood up and began walking off.

"Yes. I'll get going now." she said as she approached the door.

"And remember! Get something fun! And if you're feeling extra special, maybe something more spicy!" Shizune giggled, clearly joking about the last part. But Tsunade's new necklace didn't pick up on that.

"Get something fun. Get something spicy" the voice droned in her head as she walked off.

Tsunade arrived at the tailor's shop and opened the door. Within, she saw a vast array of clothing spread out. Everything from t-shirts, to jumpers, to coats, to dresses. Costumes, robes, swimwear, everything she could ever imagine, honestly.

"Uh... hello?" she called out.

"Hm? Yes yes! Come in!" a voice replied.

Tsunade began walking through the store towards the back, seeing a man standing behind the counter.

"Oh! Lady Tsunade! What an honor! I assume you're here to get your costume?" he said

"I am."

"Well, if you'd let me take your measurements..." he began, taking out a measuring tape.

Usually Tsunade would take issue with this. But the necklace disagreed.

"Let him take my measurements" the voice droned again.

He began working, measuring her height, length, bust, waist, arms, legs, everything, before stepping away.

"Well! All I need now is to know what kind of costume you're looking for! Something traditional? Maybe something fun? Perhaps something scary?" he asked.

Tsunade started to speak. She wanted to ask for something traditional. Something fitting of her position. But those weren't her commands.

"Something fun. Something spicy" she said.

"Fun and... spicy? Lady Hokage do you mean..?" she man said, flabbergasted

"Something fun. Something spicy" she said again.

"Fun and spicy... I'll get right on it! It should only take me an hour or so. Feel free to wait right here!" he said, motioning towards a seat.

"Wait right here" the voice in her head stated, and Tsunade walked over and sat down.

As she sat there and waited...

11122.content:
It was Kiba Inzuka's first time displaying his hypnotic prowess.

The young man of the Inzuka family had been studying hypnosis for years. It had always fascinated him. However until today he had never had a real chance to show it off, his only prior practice being on his sister Hana, his mom Tsume, and trying it on his dog Akamaru. And none of it really worked all that well.

But today would be different.

Konoha was having a bit of a feastival, and Kiba was granted permission to set up a small stage for a hypnosis show. He was going to get SOMEONE.

As the festival kicked off, Kiba found himself alone.

Nobody had flocked to his stage. Nobody had shown up to participate. Nobody even around to watch. Just an empty stage in the back corner of the town.

Kiba sighed, looking for anything. AnyONE. Then eventually she came.

Sakura Haruno, the pink-haired cutie was strolling around town. Thankfully without her then boyfriend Sasuke.

Kiba had always had a bit of a secret crush on Sakura, but never really acted on it. But today would change that.

"Hey! Sakura!" He called out, getting her attention. She approached.

"Oh. Hey Kiba. What's up? This some kind of show?" She asked

"Yeah! It's my hypnosis show. But nobody came to watch"

"Well... If you were actually doing hypnosis maybe they would" she joked

"Yeah but I'd need a volunteer... Wait a second!" He said, an idea popping into his brain "Sakura! Help me out here!"

Sakura's eyes widened

"M-me?! Wait! I didnt-- I mean I can't... Kiba I'm not... Erm..." She stammered. Kiba had never seen her flustered before. It was honestly kind of cute.

"Come on! You said it yourself! I need to actually put on a show and I need a participant for that! Please?" He begged

Sakura felt bad. She didn't particularly WANT to be hypnotized but... This was sort of her idea.

"...oh fine!" She grumbled. Kiba pumped his fist in victory as she slowly made her way on to the stage.

Kiba pulled out a sparkily watch and dangled it before her

"Seriously? Isn't this a little cliche Kiba?" She asked

"Come on! Just watch it!"

Sakura relented.

Seconds passed. Then minutes. Kiba began to worry that maybe he wouldn't be able to do it. Maybe he would fail. But then he noticed it. Sakura's eye lids began to flutter, eventually slowly closing.

She stood before him, slack and relaxed. Breathing deeply and calmly.

She was hypnotized.

He danced around the stage happily... Only to realize a few people had gathered.

He had an audience!

But... He needed to entertain them somehow! What would he do?!

11321.content:
Yang sighed as she flopped into her bunk in the team RWBY dorm. Things were stressful at Beacon. Training, classes, exams, and the occasional argument with Weiss. Usually Yang could just put it aside and not let it get to her. But tonight was not one such night.

She tossed and turned in bed. She couldn't sleep.

11PM became midnight. Midnight became 1. 1 became 2. And still, no sleep came to her.

Annoyed, tired, and desperate, Yang went to her Scroll and searched online for a solution. And soon after, she struck one. Hypnosis.

She didn't really believe in hypnosis. She thought it was all made up. Something people did on stage with actors. But at this point she was willing to try basically anything.

After another quick search, she came up with more than a few hypnosis videos. She looked some over. Most had some kind of alternative use to them. Hypnosis to quit smoking. Hypnosis for weight loss. Hypnosis for birthing.

"I just need a normal hypnosis video" she whispered to herself in annoyance.

Eventually she found one simply titled "Intro to Hypnosis: your first trance"

"Finally" she sighed "Sounds like this will just be sleeping"

Yang popped her earbuds in and began to listen. The soft spoken voice of a man came on.

"Hello there. Welcome to the intro to our hypnosis series. In this first video I'll be guiding you down into a nice, deep slumber"

"That's what I need" Yang said as she snuggled into her pillows, trying her best to get into a relaxed state to let the hypnosis take her.

"Now get nice and comfortable. Remove all distractions. No pets. No TV. Just you and your device. You and my voice. Listen to it soothe you. Listen to it take you deeper and deeper. Let your guard down. I know that may be hard, but for this to work, you need to accept my words. Trust me." he said.

Trust him? Yang didn't know this guy but at the same time... it was a video online. Not a person actually in front of her. She was willing to give a pre-recorded voice a chance.

The buxom blonde let her guard down, taking a deep breath.

"Now. Follow my voice deeper. Deeper. Deeper. Relax.... relax... relax... breathe in.... aaaand out... and in... aaand out..." the voice cooed.

Yang followed. In. Out. In. Out. Was this all it took? Breathing?

That was the last thought she had before she dropped. The trance taking her. Yang had gotten what she wanted. She was in a trance. Asleep. However... there was more to this video than she thought.

What she wanted was a quick and easy way to fall asleep... what she got was a playlist of hypnosis videos for the hypno fetishist with a bit of a humiliation kink.

The video continued on, slowly chipping away at her mind and programming her. Until eventually...

"From now on when you go to bed, you'll open up your phone and pull up one of my videos. You'll select at random. At the beginning of that video you'll hear 'Time to obey, little one' and when you do, you'll fall back into a trance for new programming. But for tonight, go ahead and open your eyes. But remain in a trance.

Yang's eyelids slowly lifted as she stared blankly upwards

"Now pick a random video from my playlist. Let it program you." he said.

Yang scrolled a moment before tapping the screen at random. A new video booted up.

"Time to obey, little one" it said, and her eyes closed again.

As morning broke, Yang stretched and hopped out of bed. She walked across the room, her bare feet dragging along the floor as she went to her dresser and grabbed her clothes for the day. She went into the bathroom to shower. But little did she know that in that bathroom her first programming would kick in.

Yang managed to get out of her clothes. However, her phone chimed as she sat her clothes in a pile. As it did, a trigger hit her, as Yang began to act according to her programming; all thanks to the video she clicked on last night, titled...

(Author's note: Whatever the video was titled will determine her actions and triggers through the day)

135111.content:
Kairi felt frustrated as she sat down after she drank some water, her keyblade in hand and the targets she was attacking all but demolished. She looked up in the sky as she thought of Sora once more, the man she loves once more selflessly sacrificed himself to save her only to disappear himself again. Kairi growled to herself that once again her ineptitude caused Sora to step in and help her, she trained with Lea to prevent that from happening, and it was all for nothing.

"Sora." Kairi muttered, she is also somewhat angry at Riku, even though she understood his reasoning.

Flashback

"You're going to save him aren't you?" Kairi asked as Riku got ready, he didn't respond, he didn't need to, he knew she knew what he was thinking, "take me with you."

"Not happening." Riku shook his head.

"I don't want to be some helpless bystander, not this time!" Kairi protested.

"Have you completed your training?" Riku simply asked, Kairi tried to utter a protest but no words came out, "that's what I thought."

"Sora is missing because of me, I need to." Kairi began but Riku stopped her.

"You need to stop blaming yourself Kairi." Riku said, "things just happen."

"Getting my heart engulfed by Xehanort and causing Sora to vanish for me isn't what I'd call things." Kairi's eyes narrowed, Riku sighed.

"Sora would kill me if anything happened to you." Riku told her, "don't let that sacrifice be for nothing." Kairi growled.

"I trained to wield a keyblade for this very reason!" Kairi bellowed.

"And once again your training is incomplete, what happens if you face something your not ready for?" Riku asked.

"And it's okay for you to make that risk?" Kairi asked.

"I'm a Keyblade Master for a reason." Riku responded, Kairi growled, "look don't worry, I'll find him and bring him back, that's a promise."

End flashback

Kairi knew Riku was only doing what he thought was best, but the thought of being treated like a child, like something that needed to be protected lingered in her mind.

"I just want to stop being so helpless." Kairi muttered, time and time again Sora risked his neck to save her, and all she could do was let it happen, that's why she dedicated herself to training with a keyblade, no longer would she stand idlily by but be Sora's equal, to save him just as he saved her, and for a while she did just that, then it went to hell as Sora risked everything once more to bring her back once more. She took a look at her keyblade.

"I'm strong enough to find him." Kairi muttered, "Sora, tell me where you are." Kairi focused as she felt her heart shine bright and shot a light in the sky, separating into many parts, she gasped upon seeing it.

"Sora?" Kairi asked, her heart was guiding her, this is a sign, nodding to herself she made a decision, using her keyblade she summoned a gummy ship, inside was a female mouse with blonde hair, googles on her head and a blue suit, her blue eyes showed confusion.

"Golly how on earth did I get here?" The mouse asked, as she looked at Kairi, "wait, I know you, you're Chip and Dale's friend."

"Yeah that's right, miss?" Kairi asked.

"Gadget Hackwrench!" Gadget introduced, "I help with the ship's repairs."

"I'm sorry I disturbed you but I need to fly to the different worlds, I'm looking for someone." Kairi said.

"Well, who am I to turn down someone in need." Gadget smiled, "this reminds me of the good old days where I was apart of the Rescue Rangers!" Kairi smiled back as she got on the ship, as Gadget finished fixing it.

"So you know how to fly?" Kairi asked.

"Do I, I always flew the ship." Gadget proudly said, as she put the finishing touches on it, "who do you think taught Chip and Dale?"

"You?" Kairi giggled, as Gadget nodded, she began powering up the Gummy Ship as she wiped her forehead.

"Phew, that should do it." Gadget sighed as she turned to Kairi, "so where to first?" Kairi saw where her heart was guiding her, Sora told her about all the worlds and the dangers they posed, but she knew her heart was guiding her to those places for a reason, she just has to believe in herself.

I'll show you Riku, I'll find Sora before you and prove that I can take care of myself! Kairi swore, if only she knew what awaited her.

"No, but I couldn't save them either, they saved me and that put me in an orphanage." Alice sighed, "that's when I came back here and well, you've seen the results." Alice pointed to the changing Wonderland.

"Is it really tied to you?" Kairi asked.

"It is, I created it by wanting to come to a place like this, probably the first sign I was never all there to begin with." Alice chuckled darkly, "anyways let's focus on our goal, we can chat later." Kairi nodded at that as they continued walking, they eventually arrived at the Queen's palace where all the guards were stationed, Alice took out her Vorpal Blade as Kairi took out her Keyblade.

"Stealth approach or head on?" Kairi asked.

"I don't do stealth!" Alice said as she charged forward.

"Somehow I knew she'd say that." Kairi sighed as she charged forward as well, the cards were alerted to their presence.

"Intruders!" The cards yelled as they went to fight them, Kairi and Alice quickly dispatched them as they went to the ground with a thud.

"Release the heartless!" The card yelled.

"Really, she's allied with the heartless?!" Kairi yelled as they fought more of the guards.

"Told you things have changed." Alice muttered as they saw heartless appear, Kairi and Alice nodded as they fought them, the heartless were tougher but they managed to take them down while only taking a few hits back, Kairi cured them with her magic as Alice nodded in appreciation, soon the floor was littered with cards down and out.

"Your majesty!" A card still standing yelled as he ran.

"Now the real fight begins." Alice smirks as Kairi followed her to the Queen, Alice took him down just as they arrived at the Queen of Hearts, who had more guards and heartless on standby.

"You!" The Queen of Hearts snarled as she pointed at Alice.

"Let me guess, off with my head?" Alice mocked, "you're welcome to try!"

"You will pay for this mockery!" The Queen of Hearts yelled as she took out a horn and blew in it.

"Here it comes." Alice muttered, a large roar was heard as the Jabberwock flew towards the courtyard, snarling at Alice and Kairi.

"OFF WITH THEIR HEADS!" The Queen of Hearts yelled as the guards and heartless advanced with the Jabberwock ready to attack as well, the queen took out a weapon and charged as well.
135111122113.title: Skip to when Alice and Kairi leave for their task

choices: The Cheshire Cat accepts Alice's deal
1351111221132.content:
"Holy hell!" Kairi said as they took out more guards while dodging the Jabberwock, more were coming as the heartless was being summoned, the Queen of Hearts yelled as she tried to kill Alice but she dodged and fought back, "this is overwhelming."

"We can handle this!" Alice insisted as she blocked another attack and swung at the queen, the Jabberwock charged at her as she barely dodged, the overwhelming numbers were becoming a bit much.

"No we can't!" Kairi insisted, "not without a plan at least!" Kairi took out more guards as she deflected the Jabberwock attacking Alice, there seemed to be no end to this.

"We're FINE!" Alice growled as she tried to kill the queen, Alice grunted as the queen slashed her as she fell clutching her arm, Kairi growled as she threw a fireball at the queen and grabbed Alice.

"BLIND!" Kairi yelled blinding the enemies while the got out, Alice still clutched her arm as she was dragged out by Kairi.

"AFTER THEM!" The queen yelled while they all went after them, the Jabberwock flew above to spot them as they were chased, Kairi panted as she shoved Alice into a cave while they hid underground, using her magic to hide themselves, they heard them pass by and miss them entirely while the Queen still yelled, they even saw the Jabberwock looking for them. Alice seemed peeved at this.

"We had this, we could've won right there if you didn't decide to be a coward and RUN!" Alice yelled, Kairi glared at her and slapped her hard, Alice winced at that.

"Do you have some sort of death wish?!" Kairi yelled back, "we were vastly outnumbered and would've died if I didn't get us out!" Alice glared as Kairi glared back.

"We would've been fine!" Alice insisted, Kairi slapped her again.

"Don't be an IDIOT!" Kairi barked, "how can you save Wonderland if you're DEAD?!" Alice got mad.

"Maybe that's what I want!" Alice hissed, before calming down as Kairi stared at her.

"Are you serious?" Kairi asked, "that's what you wanted, to die and take everyone with you?" Kairi punched her in the face, Alice yelled as they fought, Kairi dodged her blows as she attacked Alice.

"You do not get to tell me what to do, you are not my MOTHER!" Alice yelled swinging her Vorpal Blade.

"So you're going to be a coward and take your own life, is that what your MOM wanted?" Kairi shouted back.

"You NO NOTHING ABOUT ME!" Alice yelled but Kairi pounced her and glared hard.

"I know you're acting like a child throwing a temper tantrum." Kairi said, "yeah your parents are dead, that's tragic, but that's no reason to throw your own life away."

"Wonderland will die with me, it's better that way." Alice insisted.

"And who the hell do you think you are to make a decision like that, yeah they maybe your creations but they're real aren't they?!" Kairi asked, Alice gasped as her rage left her, Kairi's words finally sinking in. "do you think it's okay to just die and leave everyone that still cares about you behind like they mean nothing, the other princesses, ME?!" Alice started crying as Kairi held her down.

"I'm still here Alice, as is everyone else if you let them." Kairi said as Alice teared more and started crying, Kairi let her up as she hugged Kairi to cry.

"Mom." Alice whimpered, letting loose all her grief and pain she held back for so long, Kairi simply held her, she looked to see the Queen's forces still looking for them.

"We can still win this." Kairi said looking at Alice, "but we're doing this MY way, and the right way, no more being a martyr." Alice just nodded and sobbed, all her rage gone replaced by sorrow. She sighed as she saw the seemingly endless army, how can she turn this around, she had an idea.

"Cheshire Cat!" Kairi called out as Alice still sobbed.

"Finally, I was wondering when you'd call." The cat grinned as he appeared, "I know what you want and I can definitely help win this for you, but it'll COST you!" He sang the last part as he laughed.

"Cost me, this is your world too, don't you work for the White Queen?" Kairi asked.

"I play by my own tune, I merely help out the side that interests me the most, and right now it's looking like the Queen of Hearts." The Cheshire Cat chuckled, "however with my deal I can change my mind, unless you want me to sell you out."

"You bastard!" Kairi growled, before sighing, "what do want?"

"Oh nothing much, just something you cherish, that's all." The cat said.

"No, don't trust him." Alice weakly said.

"And you have a better plan Miss I want to kill myself?" The Cheshire Cat asked, "you had your turn, now it's all me!"

"What exactly do you mean, that can be anything." Kairi said.

"Can it, I think you know already." The Cat grinned, as Kairi gasped, "yes, that."

"You're not serious are you?" Kairi asked afraid.

"I am serious, you want my help, then I want what you've been saving for Sora, your first time." The Cat smiled.

"But you're a cat!" Kairi yelled, as the Chesire Cat smiled and turned into a human teenage male her age.

"Is this better?" The Cat smiled, "I'm not forcing you Kairi, but I recommend you hurry." Kairi panicked as the Queen's forces combed the area again, she was about to speak when Alice stopped her.

"No!" Alice said, "damnit cat, deal with me!"

"OHHHHH!" The Cheshire Cat smiled, "now this is getting interesting, what's YOUR offer?"

"Help us win, and I'm yours forever." Alice swore.

"Alice." Kairi started.

"No Kairi, this is my fault, I won't let you pay for my mistake." Alice begged as she turned to the Cheshire Cat.

"Till death do we part?" The Cheshire Cat asked.

"Till death do we part." Alice nodded, "my soul, my heart, my body, all yours to do as you please." The Cheshire Cat hummed as he looked at her and Kairi.

"Your friend is quite the delicacy, so untainted and pure." The Cheshire Cat said, "then again, I've wanted you for SOOOO long, and here you are offering yourself to me." He giggled as he stared them over.
1351111221132.title: Kairi and Alice were forced to retreat

choices: Kairi and Alice eventually won the fight
Alice and Kairi were still struggling
13511112211321.content:
"Very well, I accept your offer." The Cheshire Cat grinned as he extended a hand, Kairi tried to stop it but Alice held her back and shook her head.

"If this is what it takes." Alice said as she went to the cat and shook his hand, "this BETTER be worth it cat!"

"Oh it will be, you'll find being mine will have its perks." The Cheshire Cat chuckled as he infused Alice with magic, she saw a tattoo on her arm with the cat's face on it, "I bound you to me, just to remind you of the deal we made."

"Alright now hold your end of the deal." Alice said.

"But of course, I will happily help you win this fight." The Cheshire Cat promised as he clapped his hands, soon the residents of Wonderland were all in combat gear and charging the guards, fighting for Wonderland, the guards and heartless went to charge them as the Queen yelled while the Jabberwock attacked from above.

"Come on, while her army is distracted, you can take on those two, I'll make sure nobody interferes." The Cheshire Cat said pointing to the Queen of Hearts and the Jabberwock.

"Let's go!" Kairi said as her and Alice went to fight them with the Cheshire Cat not too far behind, he used his magic to keep them separated from the others and gave a thumbs up before disappearing, Kairi and Alice faced the Queen and the Jabberwock who gave them their full attention.

"Finally showing yourselves?!" The Queen of Hearts asked.

"Yeah and this time you have no army!" Kairi replied, "it's over for you, your 'highness.'"

"Surrender and give your throne to your sister, while you still can." Alice added.

"NEVER!" The Queen of Hearts yelled, "Wonderland is MINE!"

"Then we'll take it from you by force." Alice's eyes narrowed.

"I won't allow such impudent brats belittle me, I am QUEEN!" The Queen of Hearts declared as she ordered the Jabberwock to attack them as well. Without the army, Alice and Kairi did a good job fending them off, Kairi took care of the Queen of Hearts while Alice dealt with the Jabberwock since she had the weapon to kill it. The Queen and Kairi exchanged blows as she growled.

"You are no subject of mine, who are you?" The Queen demanded.

"None of your business!" Kairi yelled as they continued fighting, meanwhile Alice was dealing with the Jabberwock, her training helped her hold her own but the beast is tough. Alice panted as she swiped at it, cutting its face as it roared in pain.

"NO!" The Queen yelled but Kairi hit her, she winced as Kairi smirked.

"You're fight is with me, your bitchiness!" Kairi taunted, The Queen of Hearts yelled in fury.

"YOU WORM!" The queen yelled as she charged her.
13511112211321.title: The Cheshire Cat accepts Alice's deal

choices: Kairi and Alice fought against the White Queen
Kairi and Alice were forced to have the Queen of Hearts help them
135111122113211.content:
Kairi continued her fight with the Queen of Hearts, not being much of a fighter the Queen was a bit outmatched for Kairi's slightly more experience, but she was holding her own just fine.

"You call me the worm, but you rule this land with an iron fist, you murdered your own husband!" Kairi spat.

"I am the Queen, I can do whatever I want!" The Queen of Hearts declared as they continued fighting.

"And that is why you need to be stopped." Kairi coldly said as their fight continued, meanwhile Alice fought the Jabberwock, dodging its attacks rather well and countering with her own. Alice finally saw an opening and stabbed it in the chest, taking the time to cause it to fall down as she continuously slashed at it, the Jabberwock roared in pain as it leaned down causing Alice to raise her Vorpal Blade.

"This is for Wonderland!" Alice said as she lopped its head off, the monster died as it disappeared into dust, "off with your head." Kairi caught the creature's death in the corner of her eye as she pressed her attack.

"Time to end this." Kairi said as she bound her with magic, the Queen roared as she found herself unable to move and tied up.

"Unhand me, I am.....mmmph." The Queen yelled before Kairi bound her mouth as well, the two of them glanced as the heartless were vanquished and the guards surrendered, victory was theirs.

"We did it." Alice sighed as the Cheshire Cat appeared and clapped.

"Well done, bravo." The Cat grinned as he undid the barrier and smiled at the queen. She glared at him with all her hatred, The Cheshire Cat put a paw to his mouth

"It's like I told them, I only side with those that interest me, and I received an offer I had to accept." The Cheshire Cat giggled at the queen.

"You backstabber, you were working for her?!" Kairi asked.

"Do I always need to repeat myself, I play by my own rules." The Cat yawned, "but why are you angry with me for?"

"Because I have a feeling the Jabberwock was YOUR doing!" Kairi hissed, "as well as the heartless."

"Do you have proof of this?" The Cat asked, Kairi growled but said nothing, "that's what I thought, mere words and nothing more."

"It's true though isn't it?" Alice asked, "you planned this all."

"Why Alice, are you to imply that I planned all of this, what is my goal for doing that?" The Cheshire Cat asked.

"To have me." Alice said as her eyes widened, "is that why the Queen is the way she is, you did this to her didn't you?!"

"Alice, Alice, we had a deal, I helped you win and Wonderland is safe, isn't that what matters, or did you forget you belong to me now?" The Cat grinned.

"You bastard!" Kairi spat, as she drew her keyblade.

"I don't like this is going." The cat yawned, "nor will you like what will happen if you don't calm down."

"Stand down." A voice said as the White Queen arrived, "we won, that's all that matters."

"You." Alice gasped, "now I get it, you told the Cheshire Cat to drive your sister like this, and used me to help you claim the throne."

"My sister was always like this, the Cheshire Cat merely brought out what was already in there." The White Queen explained, "and a pawn doesn't need to know what the queen does."

"PAWN?!" Alice yelled.

"That's no way to talk to your queen, slave." The Cheshire Cat smiled as Alice winced in pain and her body forced to kneel, "ah my mark came in handy."

"This, all of this, is unforgivable." Kairi said as the Cat stopped her.

"I acted out of Wonderland's best interest, she was planning to end us all, I couldn't let that happen." The White Queen said, "and I will rule far better than my sister."

"From what I see you're just as bad, if not worse, you conspired with the Cheshire Cat, and had him do all this with the promise of him claiming Alice." Kairi said.

"Cheeky girl." The Cat yawned again, "shall we dispose of her?"

"No, there's no need for that." The White Queen dismissed as Kairi got ready to fight, "I know what it is she seeks." The queen revealed a white essence as Kairi gasped, her heart reacted to it indicating it belonged to Sora.

"This is yours I take it." The White Queen began, "I have no need of it, take it and leave, know that Wonderland is in good care."

"What of Alice." Kairi pointed to Alice who still couldn't move, "am I to abandon her?"

"Her path was of her own doing." The White Queen said, "her desire to end Wonderland and kill herself was of her own design, she made the deal with the Cheshire Cat fairly."

"We could've had sex instead, just saying." The Cheshire Cat said.

"We still can." Kairi muttered as he raised an eyebrow, "you said I'm pure and tempting, has that changed?"

"Don't you dare." The White Queen warned.

"Hang on." The Cat grinned, "are you giving me an offer?"

"I am, my first time with you, in exchange for saving Alice and free her from your deal, and stopping the White Queen." Kairi offered.

"I'll need more than that." The Cat said.

"Name it." Kairi stated.

"Your first time with me, and I come with you." The cat said, "I won't help you of course, I'll merely be there to make things interesting, and enjoyable."

"As long as you don't interfere with my mission we have a deal." Kairi swore.

"As I said I will not help you, but I won't hinder you either, the deal is made." The Cat laughed as he extended his paw.

"Insolence." The White Queen snarled as she summoned a weapon to her side, Kairi shook his paw and released Alice from his control, her mark vanished.

"I free you from your obligations Alice, I have someone better in mind now." The Cat laughed, Alice looked at Alice.

"I'm sorry." Alice said as she readied her weapon as well against the White Queen.

"Don't be, what are friends for?" Kairi smiled.

"Less talking more fighting." The Cheshire Cat pointed at the White Queen charging at them.
135111122113211.title: Kairi and Alice eventually won the fight

choices: Kairi and the human Cheshire Cat began their love making
The human Cheshire Cat began teasing Kairi first
Skip to when they were done
1351111221132111.content:
Kairi and Alice began to fend off the White Queen as the Cheshire Cat watched with glee. Kairi fended off her attacks while Alice went to swipe at her face, the White Queen dodged them both as she looked at them angrily.

"You must understand that I care for Wonderland." The White Queen said, "I do this to ensure its safety."

"By sacrificing people and using them to your own ends?!" Alice asked, "you're just as bad as your sister, maybe worse!"

"My sister is a brute, I'll run this world with elegance and grace." The White Queen calmly said as she went for a counter attack, there was tact and strategy in her fighting style, unlike the Queen of Hearts who just came in swinging and yelling.

"Any ruler who disregards their own subjects is a terrible ruler!" Kairi added as she went to use magic followed by a combo, this caused the White Queen to stagger.

"Sacrifices must be made for the greater good, surly you understand that?" The White Queen asked as she went in again.

"And who's greater good is that, yours?" Alice asked, "a ruler must take their subjects into consideration and make a choice that's best for everyone, not just for the ruler."

"They are ignorant, incapable of knowing what's best for them, allowing my sister to rule them is proof of that." The White Queen countered, "this is a monarchy, I will not allow peasants to dictate how I run Wonderland."

"And that is why we can't allow you to rule either, neither you NOR your sister are fit for it!" Kairi yelled as they continued. The White Queen sighed.

"Then I must dispose of you, know that this gives me no joy." The White Queen remarked as she continued her assault. No more words were exchanged as the fight continued, eventually Kairi and Alice managed to overpower the White Queen and tie her up as well, both sisters glared at each other.

"At least I bask in the satisfaction of knowing you go down with me." The Queen of Hearts mocked.

"Silence you brute." The White Queen argued back as Alice knocked them both out.

"Well done!" The Cheshire Cat clapped, "now nobody is ruler, chaos will reign!"

"Not quite." Alice sighed as she took their crowns, "I'll be the ruler."

"Oh?" The Cheshire Cat said as he laughed, "you'll be terrible at it, practically dooming your own world that you created, I LOVE IT!"

"It won't be easy, but as long as I control my mind, Wonderland won't change any more and I can fix things." Alice replied.

"But what good is sanity, we're all insane if you think about it, then again you made us this way!" The Cheshire Cat grinned, "but I'll leave you to it, Kairi, I think we need to get going." Kairi sighed as she collected the essence of Sora.

"I have to go, I need to find Sora, maybe these essences will help me find him." Kairi said to Alice.

"Good luck." Alice replied as they hugged and parted ways, the Cheshire Cat following Kairi.

"Oh I'm going to enjoy sticking around with you, who knows what crazy adventures you'll run into?" The Cheshire Cat grinned, "but first thing is first, you promised me your first time." The sly cat turned into his human form as Kairi sighed.

"Can it wait, you never said when it needs to be done." Kairi said,

"Oh that won't do, I'd rather get things over with, and you can benefit from that as well, wouldn't you agree?" The Cheshire Cat asked smiling.

"I don't feel comfortable doing this yet." Kairi said, "I'll need some time."

"Oh that won't be a problem at all!" The Cat said as he touched her forehead, Kairi groaned as she gripped her head before her eyes fluttered and closed, she opened her eyes that became glassy and vacant and smiled.

"Sora!" Kairi exclaimed happily, "how I missed you!"

"Show me how much?" The Cheshire Cat asked as Kairi smirked as she undressed before him.

info.brief_description: Girls from various forms of fiction get mind controlled!
info.description:
I posted this over on Chyoa, but it's been getting almost no interaction other than people favoriting. My hope is that reposting what I have there, over here, will get some more people making additions!

RULES

- Please try to keep storylines focused on the general concept. If you have a story about Tsunade from Naruto getting hypnotized, please keep things focused on her. I'm fine with you adding other characters, but make it make sense, and keep Tsunade as the focus
- No vore, gore, scat, urination, BDSM, feet, or Malesub
- Please try to keep chapters long. At least 300 words, but I'd prefer more. If I feel like you're just phoning it in I will delete chapters. Obvious exception for choice chapters (ex: What character gets hypnotized?) type stuff
- I may add more rules later. But otherwise, go nuts!
